notes: spawn.rs: 'Cloud agent failed'/'Cloud follow-up...' flow into anyhow!(message) -> handle_spawn_error UI error (model.rs:1305 same string, also UI) -> translate; spawn.rs:222 log::info! -> telemetry. request_file_edits.rs: 'Failed to save file' goes into DiffApplicationFailed error reported to LLM, 'Failed to generate diffs'(+{err:?}) via safe_warn! -> telemetry. zero_state_block.rs: all UI (zero-state header/description/hyperlink/'What's new in Oz' section header) -> translate; kept brand Oz/Agent. requests.rs: out-of-credits + technical-difficulties pushed into transcript markdown rendered to user -> translate; {next_time}/{upgrade_url} preserved, [Upgrade] markdown label translated. modal_shell.rs: Left/Right side section labels + Save changes button -> translate. external_secrets/mod.rs:45 'Database,Api\ Credential' is an `op` CLI --categories arg (protocol_key); line 240 link_message + line 227 link_message '{}'=SecretManager(brand) -> UI translate, {} kept standalone. launch_config.rs:132 .expect -> panic; Mocked Config/First Tab/Second Tab in make_mock_single_window_launch_config() mock builder -> test_fixture. lib.rs: 2518/1065/670 panic!/.expect -> panic; 889&912 'Failed to forward startup args' .context()+log::error!+pre_sentry_errors and 952 'Failed to create pty spawner' .context()? -> error-context telemetry. referral_theme_status.rs:132/133 safe_info! logging -> telemetry; 161 .expect -> panic. referrals_page.rs: Send button + T-shirt reward label -> translate; 'referrals invites' is fn search_terms -> bilingual append; '{claimed_count}+' pure numeric format (identity, no translatable text). terminal/input.rs: all DismissibleToast UI -> translate; image-limit {limit_name} fills English 'per query'/'per conversation' so kept standalone bracketed. in_band_command_executor.rs:145 Debug fmt + 321/322 safe_info! -> telemetry; 332 PowerShell command string sent to pty -> protocol_key. theme_chooser.rs: hint text + accessibility content -> UI translate. computer_use mouse.rs: map_err format! error strings returned as Result<_,String> to caller (not localized UI) -> telemetry. transport.rs: Error::user_facing_error builds UserFacingError for SSH remote-server failed banner -> UI translate; 'Failed to {}' {}=action_description English phrase kept standalone.
